title: Slack message broadcasts to channel when replying to thread
symptom: When replying to a Slack thread using the n8n Slack node, the reply message is also sent to the main channel instead of just the thread.
applies_when: Using the Slack node to reply to a thread
Reply to Thread option is enabled
not_this_if: Using HTTP Request node with reply_broadcast set to false
root_cause: The Slack node's configuration for replying to threads may inadvertently include broadcasting to the main channel if the 'Reply to Thread' option is enabled without proper adjustments.
fix_steps: Disable the 'Reply to Thread' option in the Slack node settings
Only set the 'Message Timestamp to Reply To' without enabling the thread reply option
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Reply to Thread' option in the Slack node to prevent broadcasting.
